onset.Description: Video frame presentation time stamps in seconds.

duration.Description: Event duration in seconds. 'n/a' for frame‐based events.

mean_R.Description: Mean red channel value for this video frame (0-255).

mean_G.Description: Mean green channel value for this video frame (0-255).

mean_B.Description: Mean blue channel value for this video frame (0-255).

mean_H.Description: Mean hue (HSV) for this video frame (0-179).

mean_S.Description: Mean saturation (HSV) for this video frame (0-255).

mean_V.Description: Mean value/brightness (HSV) for this video frame (0-255).

mean_Lum.Description: Mean luminance (CIELAB L-channel) for this video frame (0-255).

delta_R.Description: Absolute change in mean red channel between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

delta_G.Description: Absolute change in mean green channel between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

delta_B.Description: Absolute change in mean blue channel between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

delta_H.Description: Absolute change in mean hue (HSV) between this frame and the previous one (0-179).

delta_S.Description: Absolute change in mean saturation (HSV) between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

delta_V.Description: Absolute change in mean value/brightness (HSV) between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

delta_Lum.Description: Absolute change in mean luminance (CIELAB L-channel) between this frame and the previous one (0-255).

n_faces.Description: Number of faces detected in the frame.

face_area_total.Description: Total area of all detected faces as fraction of frame.

face_area_avg.Description: Average area per detected face as fraction of frame.

rms.Description: Root-mean-square amplitude of the audio segment aligned to this frame.

zcr.Description: Zero-crossing rate of the audio segment aligned to this frame.
